items.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to 10 years in jail for corruption
items.dek: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim stemmed from a laptop deal during his term as Indonesia's education minister.
items.body: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim stemmed from a laptop deal during his term as Indonesia's education minister.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man with same name as Alaska Sen. Dan Sullivan can appear on primary ballot, state's Supreme Court rules
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Parcel bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and family in Monaco - reports
items.dek: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
items.body: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
items.author: IriLine Desk
